case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. WILBERTO CANCHE DZUL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,878.02 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DZUL, WILBERTO CANCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED NOV-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DZUL, WILBERTO CANCHE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-22-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WILBERTO CANCHE DZUL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2020 - JUDGMENT .PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILBERTO CANCHE DZUL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DZUL, WILBERTO CANCHE $1,878.02 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,978.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
